mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 3.5% signals tightening labor markets, which correlates with stronger corporate earnings growth and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines below 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals robust supply-side expansion, which drives corporate profitability and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns when both INDPRO and GDPC1 show positive growth in the same quarter.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month consecutive increase in housing starts (HOUST) above 1.25 million units signals strong demand for residential construction, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where HOUST exceeds 1250 for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading below 2.0% indicates stable inflation expectations, which supports lower risk premiums and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL remains below 2.0.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and declining unemployment (UNRATE) signals a strong labor market, which drives consumer spending and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns when PAYEMS increases and UNRATE decreases simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: A 6-month rising trend in residential sales (RSAFS) indicates sustained demand for housing, which correlates with positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in 50%+ of instances where RSAFS shows a 6-month upward trend.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above 110 signals stronger manufacturing activity, which drives corporate earnings and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 110.
